features: 🎉 Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.55! This update brings major analytics upgrades, a smarter Pulse AI engine, a new Mock Test schedule type in the planner, and a full round of bug fixes and performance improvements.

🎯 Mock Test in Planner — You can now add Mock Test as a dedicated schedule type in the Planner (alongside Self Study, Class, and Pending Topic). Mock test sessions get a distinct red accent and 🎯 icon so they stand out.

📈 Mock Exam Analytics Overhaul — The Analytics page now has a dedicated Mock Exam Performance section with ACCA / CSEB tabs, average scores, a trend chart, and a scrollable Detailed History popup showing every mock with date, time, topic, score, and notes.

🧠 Smarter Pulse AI — Fixed a bug where Pulse AI always showed 0% schedule completion even when tasks were finished. The AI now correctly reads your completed schedule items and accurately reports your Planning Score.

🏋 Pulse AI Weakest Areas — The AI no longer says 'No weaknesses detected' when you ace your mock exams. It now intelligently falls back to highlighting untested syllabus areas so you always have an actionable recommendation.
🔥 Schedule Icons Fixed — Garbled emoji icons in schedule cards have been replaced with clean, consistent icons across all schedule types and views.
⚡ Exam Readiness Engine — Fixed title rendering and updated column headers from abbreviations (Acc%, Mock%, Qs) to full readable names (Accuracy %, Mock Exam %, Questions).

🔍 Performance & Stability — Removed redundant re-render calls, fixed chart title visibility in Mock Analytics, resolved schedule date window bug that caused incorrect weekly stats, and consolidated analytics sub-renders for faster page loads.
